name: Game Boy
description: Nintendo's original monochrome handheld platform. Known for long battery life, portability, puzzle games, and major portable entries in Nintendo franchises.

eras.title: Launch and Puzzle Era
eras.description: Early handheld identity built around Tetris, simple action games, and portable-first design.

eras.title: Nintendo Portable Era
eras.description: Major Nintendo franchises adapt to handheld design with Kirby, Zelda, Metroid, and Wario.

eras.title: Pokémon Era
eras.description: Pokémon revitalizes the platform late in its life and carries it into the Game Boy Color transition.
